user8426 Hi, this is just a quick message passed on by lunarempire. By solo dev, I meant I have built up the game. People were involved in the creation but they never continued to work on the game. In the images you linked you show the groups members and the credits of my game. 1. Kidgame_reallycool worked on the first map. I built the rest. Me and him have not been in contact for a while and he has not worked on the game since 2024. 2.in the group you were looking at, the other person in developers is the scripter i hired for the new game. Connor 19/08/2025 11:36
Mod Name: Detonation --- Overview Detonation is a fast-paced, team-based TF2 gamemode that combines tactical escort mechanics with classic TF2 chaos. Teams battle over a single bomb: Red Team must deliver it to the enemy base, while Blue Team fights to stop them. Success requires teamwork, strategy, and precise timing. --- Teams & Objectives Red Team (Bomb Carrier Team)
  • Picks up the bomb at spawn.
  • Carrier has –10% health and –25% movement speed while holding the bomb.
  • Red Team must escort the carrier through the map to the enemy Control Point.
  • At the Control Point, the carrier must hold the zone for 30 seconds to successfully plant the bomb.
  • While holding the CP, the carrier receives a +20% health boost.
  • If the carrier dies before the 30-second hold completes, the bomb drops, and another teammate can pick it up to continue the objective.
Blue Team (Defenders)
  • Prevent Red Team from delivering the bomb.
  • Kill or push the carrier out of the Control Point to pause or reset the plant timer.
  • Optional secondary objectives (e.g., activating disarm zones or temporary barriers) can slow or block the Red Team.
--- Round Win Conditions
  • Red Team Victory: A Red Team player completes the 30-second hold in the enemy Control Point.
  • Blue Team Victory: Carrier is eliminated or unable to complete the plant within the round time.
--- Gameplay Flow 1. Red Team picks up the bomb. 2. Carrier moves toward the enemy Control Point, escorted by teammates. 3. Blue Team attempts to stop the carrier through combat and map control. 4. Carrier reaches CP → 30-second hold begins; health boost applies. 5. Carrier dies → bomb drops, a new Red player can continue the hold. 6. 30-second hold completes → Red Team wins. --- Map Suggestions
  • CS-style TF2 ports: cp_dust2, de_inferno_tf2, de_mirage_tf2, de_nuke_tf2
  • Original TF2 CP maps: cp_granary, cp_process, cp_office
Maps can include multiple phases: normal TF2 combat first, followed by the Detonation phase. Future gamemodes can reuse the same maps with slight entity modifications. --- Highlights
  • Combines escort mechanics with Control Point holding.
  • Multiple carriers possible if the first dies.
  • Encourages team coordination: protect the carrier, contest zones, activate secondary objectives.
  • Flexible maps with multiple phases allow future expansion.
  • TF2-style fast-paced action with strategic depth.

21:03
-- Configuration local maps = {"gm_construct", "gm_flatgrass", "gm_bigcity"} -- Replace with your 3 maps local roundInterval = 300 -- 5 minutes (in seconds) -- Track kills per player local playerKills = {} -- Reset all stats local function ResetStats() playerKills = {} for _, ply in ipairs(player.GetAll()) do ply:SetFrags(0) ply:SetDeaths(0) end end -- Get top fragger local function GetTopPlayer() local topPly, topKills = nil, -1 for ply, kills in pairs(playerKills) do if kills > topKills then topKills = kills topPly = ply end end return topPly, topKills end -- Announce winner + change map local function EndRound() local topPly, kills = GetTopPlayer() if IsValid(topPly) then PrintMessage(HUD_PRINTTALK, "Round over! Top player: " .. topPly:Nick() .. " with " .. kills .. " kills!") else PrintMessage(HUD_PRINTTALK, "Round over! No kills this round.") end -- Pick random next map local nextMap = maps[math.random(#maps)] PrintMessage(HUD_PRINTTALK, "Changing map to: " .. nextMap .. "...") -- Small delay before map change timer.Simple(5, function() RunConsoleCommand("changelevel", nextMap) end) ResetStats() end -- Track kills hook.Add("PlayerDeath", "TrackKills", function(victim, inflictor, attacker) if IsValid(attacker) and attacker:IsPlayer() and attacker ~= victim then playerKills[attacker] = (playerKills[attacker] or 0) + 1 end end) -- Round timer local function StartRounds() timer.Create("RoundTimer", roundInterval, 0, EndRound) ResetStats() end hook.Add("Initialize", "StartRoundsOnInit", StartRounds) -- HUD element for top fragger if CLIENT then hook.Add("HUDPaint", "TopFraggerHUD", function() local topPly, kills = GetTopPlayer() if IsValid(topPly) and kills > 0 then draw.SimpleText("Top: " .. topPly:Nick() .. " [" .. kills .. " kills]", "Trebuchet24", ScrW() / 2, 50, Color(255, 50, 50), TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, TEXT_ALIGN_TOP) end end) end

22:52
FrutigerAeroDreamer 22 Sep @ 10:45pm  Overall, I think this mod has a lot of potential to it if development is continued forward, and it can save a lot of time for people who just want an easy way to insert a deathmatch gamemode without having to spend time coding a fix into the game. I personally would recommend continuing this mod, because there's not a lot of mods like this that work anymore, or are too complicated to set up. Keep up the good work! FrutigerAeroDreamer 22 Sep @ 10:45pm  What can be added/changed: -Add console commands or additional chat commands for people who prefer to use those elements; -Create a wait-time, where players can access the context menu to add weapons using other addons (like custom loadout addons) before the round starts; -Put the time somewhere else that's not next to the "Round Leaderboard"; -Add a ui in the spawnmenu or create a command for one (ex: properdeathmatch_settings or open_properdeathmatch) to allow people to change the location of UI elements (ex: time, leaderboard, end results, ect.); -Create custom gamemodes that can be preselected by the admin or owner of the server, or voted by people in the server (depending if an admin checked a checkbox for public voting of a gamemode); -Try creating more preview photos with a thumbnail so that people will feel more inclined to download the mod; -Fix the error that persists when the voting options/settings are drawn on the screen. FrutigerAeroDreamer 22 Sep @ 10:44pm  Ok, so I tested this recently, and it seems very promising out of the box. I think this idea can be expanded quite a lot if given enough time. So here's my opinion on the functions of this mod so far, and what can be improved: What I like about this mod: -Obvious leaderboard system; -Clear display of how many killpoints a player has racked up; -Popup menu for voting a map; -Use of profile pictures after the match ends. -No need for advanced coding, essentially plug and play.

per SteamTools telegram: SteamTools后端近日被攻击导致无法解锁 SteamTools后端近日被攻击导致无法解锁，恢复后 会进行公告。 其他的问也白问，和灌水没区别 依赖Steam 的 可改用 Greenluma 过渡。 也可以改用 民间 ksmlc 加强版 GreenLumaPro解锁工具 https://bbs.steamtools.net/forum.php?mod=viewthread&tid=15059 https://caigamer.cn/thread-1024.htm 只是玩已下载游戏的 可以通过 GBE 和 SAC 脱离 Steam 继续游玩。 SAC https://github.com/SteamAutoCracks/Steam-auto-crack/releases 当然 也可以 时不时 同 tools 重启Steam，说不定哪次就好了。 The SteamTools backend was recently attacked, making it impossible to unlock. An announcement will be made after recovery. All same questions are in vain; they are no different from rambling on Those relying on Steam can switch to Greenluma for the transition. You can also switch to the folk ksmlc enhanced version GreenLumaPro Unlocking tool https://bbs.steamtools.net/forum.php?mod=viewthread&tid=15059 https://caigamer.cn/thread-1024.htm Those who have already downloaded the game can leave Steam and continue playing through GBE and SAC. SAC https://github.com/SteamAutoCracks/Steam-auto-crack/releases Of course, you can also restart Steam with tools from time to time. Maybe one time it will be fine.
